final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a cozy healing-style scene featuring an orange tabby cat lounging on a windowsill in winter.

Style/medium: soft digital illustration, healing (iyashikei) aesthetic, warm painterly brushwork reminiscent of Japanese slice-of-life art
Composition: medium shot from slightly below eye level, cat centered on windowsill, window frame as natural border dividing warm interior and cold exterior
Subject: fluffy orange tabby cat lying stretched out on a wooden windowsill, eyes half-closed in contentment, thick soft fur with visible individual strands
Scene/backdrop: cozy indoor room with warm ambient glow on the interior side; outside the window, a quiet winter street with gently falling snow, muted grey-blue tones
Lighting/mood: warm golden indoor light wrapping the cat from behind and below, cold diffused daylight from the snowy street outside, tender and heart-softening mood
Color palette: warm amber and cream tones dominate the interior; the cat's orange fur glows as the focal anchor; cool pale blue and white for the snowy exterior, creating a gentle warm-cool contrast
Materials/textures: ultra-fluffy fur with soft downy texture, frosted glass condensation on window edges, smooth worn wood of the windowsill
Avoid: harsh outlines, dark or moody atmosphere, photorealistic rendering, watermark, stuffer aesthetic
